notes: Use hole centers and plate face as drawing QA references only.

tolerance_policy.general: Use existing drawing metadata only; do not infer additional tolerances.
notes: No automatic GD&T inference is required for this fixture.

critical_features.description: Base plate envelope communicates overall bracket footprint.
critical_features.reason: Defines the stock and primary visual context.

critical_features.description: Two mounting hole diameters must remain visible and traceable.
critical_features.reason: Hole sizes are required for the strict-pass drawing fixture.

required_dimensions.label: Left mounting hole diameter
required_dimensions.reason: Confirms the smaller mounting hole size.

required_dimensions.label: Right mounting hole diameter
required_dimensions.reason: Confirms the larger mounting hole size.
